name: agentgateway-ui-screenshots
description: Playwright screenshot automation for the agentgateway product UI (docs assets + visual regression)

scripts.clean:ui: docker ps -aq --filter publish=15100 | xargs -I{} docker rm -f {}
scripts.capture:all: npm run clean:ui && npm run test:standalone && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:mcp && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:a2a && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:llm && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:virtual && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:openapi && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:jwt && npm run clean:ui
scripts.update:all: npm run clean:ui && npm run test:standalone -- --update-snapshots && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:mcp -- --update-snapshots && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:a2a -- --update-snapshots && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:llm -- --update-snapshots && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:virtual -- --update-snapshots && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:openapi -- --update-snapshots && npm run clean:ui && npm run test:jwt -- --update-snapshots && npm run clean:ui
